allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''discord.js''\); console.log\(''ContainerBuilder:'', typeof d.ContainerBuilder\); console.log\(''MediaGalleryBuilder:'', typeof d.MediaGalleryBuilder\); console.log\(''TextDisplayBuilder:'', typeof d.TextDisplayBuilder\); console.log\(''SeparatorBuilder:'', typeof d.SeparatorBuilder\); console.log\(''SeparatorSpacingSize:'', typeof d.SeparatorSpacingSize\); console.log\(''MessageFlags.IsComponentsV2:'', d.MessageFlags.IsComponentsV2?.toString\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const mods = [''automod'',''verification'',''autoroles'',''suggestions'',''levels'',''customEmbed'',''giveaways'',''serverStats'',''transcript'',''reviews'']; for \(const m of mods\) { try { const mod = require\(''./src/modules/'' + m\); console.log\(m + '': '' + Object.keys\(mod\).join\('', ''\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(m + '': ERROR - '' + e.message.split\(''\\n''\)[0]\); } }")

Bash(node -e "const mods=[''catalog'',''orders''];for\(const m of mods\){try{const mod=require\(''./src/modules/''+m\);console.log\(m+'': ''+Object.keys\(mod\).join\('', ''\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(m+'': ERROR - ''+e.message.split\(''\\n''\)[0]\);}}")
